name: project
description: A premium, full-stack E-commerce Bookstore application built with the MERN (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) stack. This project features a sophisticated, "Midnight and Platinum" luxury aesthetic with high-end typography and smooth animations.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run backend" "wait-on http://localhost:5000 && npm run frontend"
scripts.start:all: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run dev --prefix backend
